title: No Bashfulness In Begging.
content:
To get thine ends, lay bashfulness aside;
    Who fears to ask doth teach to be deny'd.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "No Bashfulness In Begging."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
